languages.text: "Все верно, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана, все верно..." {n}Полковник задумчиво скрипит зубами, глядя на вас.{/n}
"Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Все верно, наследни{mf|к|ца} Себериана, все верно..." {n}Полковник задумчиво скрипит зубами, глядя на вас.{/n}

languages.text: "Wohl wahr, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, wohl wahr ..." {n}Der Colonel knirscht nachdenklich mit den Zähnen, während er dich betrachtet.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Wohl wahr, {mf|Erbe|Erbin} von Seberian, wohl wahr ..." {n}Der Colonel knirscht nachdenklich mit den Zähnen, während er dich betrachtet.{/n}

languages.text: « Précisément, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian, précisément... » {n}Les dents serrées, le colonel vous observe d'un air songeur.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: « Précisément, {mf|héritier|héritière} de Seberian, précisément... » {n}Les dents serrées, le colonel vous observe d'un air songeur.{/n}

languages.text: «Así es, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, así es...». {n}El coronel, pensativo, rechina los dientes y te mira.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: «Así es, hereder{mf|o|a} de Seberian, así es...». {n}El coronel, pensativo, rechina los dientes y te mira.{/n}

languages.text: "Çok doğru Seberian'ın vârisi, çok doğru..." {n}Gözlerini sana diken albay, düşünceli bir şekilde dişlerini gıcırdatıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: "Çok doğru Seberian'ın vârisi, çok doğru..." {n}Gözlerini sana diken albay, düşünceli bir şekilde dişlerini gıcırdatıyor.{/n}
"Çok doğru Seberian'ın vârisi, çok doğru..." {n}Gözlerini sana diken Albay, düşünceli bir şekilde dişlerini gıcırdatıyor.{/n}

languages.text: “说得没错，塞贝里安的继承人，说得没错……”{n}上校一边盯着你，一边若有所思地磨着牙。{/n}
languages.original_text: "Quite right, heir of Seberian, quite right..." {n}The colonel thoughtfully grinds his teeth while staring at you.{/n}

traits.locale_text: “说得没错，塞贝里安的继承人，说得没错……”{n}上校一边盯着你，一边若有所思地磨着牙。{/n}

languages.text: 「確かに、シベリアの相続人、確かに…」{n}大佐はあなたを見つめながら考え事をしながら歯を食いしばる.{/n}
